mapper.update: UPDATE game_level SET level_no = #{levelNo}, level_name = #{levelName}, level_data = #{levelData}, enabled = #{enabled}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, update_time = NOW() WHERE pk_id = #{pkId}
mapper.select: SELECT pk_id, level_no, level_name, level_data, enabled, sort_no, create_time, update_time FROM game_level WHERE pk_id = #{pkId}
SELECT pk_id, level_no, level_name, level_data, enabled, sort_no, create_time, update_time FROM game_level ORDER BY sort_no ASC, level_no ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT pk_id, level_no, level_name, level_data, enabled, sort_no, create_time, update_time FROM game_level WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, level_no ASC
